1: The name of the God of Jacob defend thee;
2: And strengthen thee out of Zion;
3: And accept thy burnt sacrifice; Selah. Selah.
5: The LORD LORD fulfil all thy petitions.
6: With the saving strength of his right hand.
7: But we will remember the name of the LORD LORD our God.
8: But we are risen, and stand upright.
9: Let the king hear us when we call.
